stemHtml: While going around in an airport with temperature at negative 10 degrees, a light twin-engine aircraft with normally-aspirated piston engines experiences an engine failure. How will the environment described affect V<sub>MCA</sub>?

options.a: Decreased effectiveness of controls due to low air temperature will increase V<sub>MCA</sub>.
options.b: Increased effectiveness of controls due to high air density will decrease V<sub>MCA</sub>.
options.c: High engine performance on the operating engine due to high air density will decrease V<sub>MCA</sub>.
options.d: High engine performance on the operating engine due to high air density will increase V<sub>MCA</sub>.
